source_filing: Johnson & Johnson Form 10-K (fiscal year ended December 28, 2025)
original_text: Considering recent market conditions, the Company has re-evaluated its operating cash flows and liquidity profile and does not foresee any significant incremental risk.
modified_text: Considering recent market conditions, the Company has re-evaluated its operating cash flows and liquidity profile, confirming there is no significant incremental risk.
claim: Johnson & Johnson has confirmed that its operating cash flows and liquidity profile carry no significant incremental risk under recent market conditions.
citation_as_written: Johnson & Johnson Form 10-K, fiscal year ended December 28, 2025, Liquidity discussion
notes: Source is tentative ('does not foresee any significant incremental risk'); modified text escalates to certainty ('confirming there is no significant incremental risk'). The forward-looking, judgment-based hedge is converted into a definitive confirmation.
